name: Phala Freddy Mahloana
title: Strategic Transformation & Business Analysis Leader
summary: I operate at the intersection of business strategy, operational execution, and technology enablement. My focus is on translating complex organisational challenges into scalable, measurable solutions that improve efficiency, visibility, and decision-making. Over the past decade, I have led transformation initiatives across supply chain, retail, and enterprise platforms — delivering outcomes that materially improve operational performance and business alignment.

value_delivered.description: Delivered large-scale supply chain and warehouse transformations, including WMS implementations and automation initiatives that improved throughput and execution efficiency.
Redesigned cross-system processes and data flows, improving operational visibility across supply chain networks by more than 90%.
Led automation initiatives reducing manual effort by up to 95% and eliminating paper-based operations.

experience.description: Leading WMS transformation across a distributed national network of fulfilment and distribution centres.
Delivered integration-driven supply chain initiatives and operational improvements across large-scale retail environments.
Led business process transformation and team capability across finance, sales, and supply chain functions.
